DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS STI SERVICES, LLC, AND SUTRO TOWER, INC'S. MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS - THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND DENIED AS FOLLOWS. WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER, YOUNG BROADCASTING OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. ("KRON") SHALL PROVIDE CODE-COMPLAINT RESPONSES AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS (IF ANY) TO RFP 1-8; 11 (OVER BROAD, RELEVANCE, AND PRIVACY OBJECTIONS OVERRULED); 15; 17; 19 (OVER BROAD AND RELEVANCE OBJECTIONS OVERRULED); 22; 23 & 26 & 28 & 29 (OVER BROAD AND RELEVANCE OBJECTIONS OVERRULED, THE RESPONSE IS LIMITED TO APRIL 1, 2012 TO JUNE 1, 2015); 36. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO 30-33. THE REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Appearances:
Paul H. Duvall, of King & Ballow Law Offices, Tel. 424.253.1255, for plaintiffs;
Scott M. McLeod, of Cooper White & Cooper, Tel. 415.433.1900, for defendants.

PLAINTIFF YOUNG BROADCASTING OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC., Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Special Interrogatories And Requests For Admission is granted in part and denied in part. The moving party shall prepare a proposed order, approved as to form. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAUL H. DUVALL OF KING & BALLOW, TEL. NO. 1-424-253-1255 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Young Broadcasting of San Francisco, Inc.'s application for the pro hac vice admission of Douglas Pierce is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - MATTY. PAUL H. DUVALL OF KING & BALLOW LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 1-619-609-3208 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SCOTT M. MCLEOD OF COOPER WHITE & COOPER, TEL. NO. 1-415-765-6299 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS STI SERVICES, LLC, AND SUTRO TOWER, INC's. Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents - The Motion is GRANTED and DENIED as follows. Within two weeks of Notice of this order, Young Broadcasting of San Francisco, Inc. ("KRON") shall provide code-complaint responses and responsive documents (if any) to RFP 1-8; 11 (over broad, relevance, and privacy objections overruled); 15; 17; 19 (over broad and relevance objections overruled); 22; 23 & 26 & 28 & 29 (over broad and relevance objections overruled, the response is limited to April 1, 2012 to June 1, 2015); 36. The Motion is DENIED as to 30-33. The requests for Sanctions is Denied. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
